lines: We turn ideas into digital products that scale.
description.mobile: High-performance web development. We turn ideas into digital products that scale.

paragraphs: I'm David Abril, a full-stack developer with a 8.75/10 GPA in Computer Science. I founded Abril Codes to build real software: no templates, no shortcuts.
We work with Dana and Teo, mobile and frontend developers. We cover every front to deliver complete products.
About.aiBody: We use AI as a tool, not a crutch. Every technical decision is ours. AI handles implementation details; architectural judgment and quality always remain with us.

design.title: Custom Design
design.description: Unique designs that reflect your brand and engage your audience across every device.
design.fullDescription: We don't use generic templates. We create an exclusive experience based on your brand image, values, and specific needs.
design.bottomRightDescription: Your digital presence stands out from competitors with memorable experiences that reinforce your brand's unique positioning.

items.title: Unique visual identity
items.description: Every web element adapted to your style and message.

items.title: Market differentiation
items.description: A custom design helps you stand out from the competition.

items.title: Responsive
items.description: Your site adapts to every device without losing quality.

development.title: Web Development
development.description: Responsive websites with clean, efficient code that works flawlessly across all devices.
development.fullDescription: We build with modern technology, prioritizing speed, security, and scalability. No reliance on third-party templates or plugins.
development.subtitle: What does this mean for your business?
development.bottomRightDescription: Professional development ensures your site operates without limitations and adapts to present and future needs.

items.title: Faster speed
items.description: Websites up to 4 times faster than traditional ones.

items.title: Scalability
items.description: Handles high traffic without compromising performance.

items.title: Total flexibility
items.description: No dependence on external templates or plugins.

support.title: Support & Maintenance
support.description: Ongoing technical support and updates to keep your site secure, fast, and aligned with your goals.
support.fullDescription: Our relationship doesn't end at launch. We provide ongoing maintenance: technical support, updates, security monitoring, and continuous optimization.
support.subtitle: How does this benefit your business?
support.bottomRightDescription: Focus on your business while we handle the technical side. We prevent issues before they impact your users.

items.title: Continuous monitoring
items.description: Regular checks to prevent issues before they affect users.

items.title: Security updates
items.description: Timely patches to protect against new threats.

items.title: Performance optimization
items.description: Ongoing improvements to speed and responsiveness.

items.title: Growth support
items.description: Technical assistance as your business scales.

TeamCard.about: We value close collaboration, transparent communication, and continuous improvement to deliver products that genuinely impact your business.

Footer.description: Precise technology, functional design: professional websites that convert visitors into clients.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 - David Ignacio Abril Perrig - Responsive design & frontend
